---
applyTo: "**"
---

# Architecture rules — DirectorioLocal CR

This is the source of truth for architectural decisions. Verified against Astro 6 and Supabase docs (2026).

---

## 1. Rendering strategy

### Default: pure SSG
`output: 'static'` (Astro default). Every directory page is pre-rendered at build time. This is the SEO-critical path.

### Server Islands for dynamic chunks
Use `server:defer` on components whose content changes faster than the build cycle:
- Reviews list on a provider profile
- "Recently active providers in this district" widgets
- Aggregated rating numbers if they update frequently

### Migration path
- **Phase 1 (MVP)**: pure SSG, no adapter, deploy as static site to Vercel
- **Phase 2 (Astro Actions for forms)**: add `@astrojs/vercel` adapter, switch to `output: 'server'`, mark every page `export const prerender = true` except the few that need server rendering
- **Phase 3 (build > 5 min)**: enable Vercel ISR with `adapter: vercel({ isr: true })`
- **Phase 4 (auth, geo redirects)**: add Astro middleware with `middlewareMode: 'edge'`

`output: 'hybrid'` no longer exists in Astro 6. Don't reach for it.

---

## 2. Project structure

```
src/
├── pages/                          # Routes — kebab-case files, [param].astro for dynamic
├── components/                     # PascalCase.astro — presentational only, no business logic
│   ├── ui/                         # Generic primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input)
│   ├── directory/                  # Domain components (ProviderCard, CategoryGrid, SearchBar)
│   └── seo/                        # JsonLd, OpenGraph, Breadcrumbs
├── layouts/                        # BaseLayout, DirectoryLayout, ProviderLayout
├── lib/                            # ALL business logic + DB access
│   ├── supabase.ts                 # Singleton typed client
│   ├── queries/                    # Pure data-fetching functions, one file per domain
│   ├── seo/                        # JSON-LD generators per page type
│   ├── slug.ts                     # toSlug, fromSlug
│   └── logger.ts                   # No-op in prod, console in dev
├── actions/                        # Astro Actions — server-side mutations with Zod validation
│   └── index.ts
├── types/
│   └── database.types.ts           # Generated by Supabase CLI — never hand-edit
└── env.d.ts                        # Typed import.meta.env
```

### Path aliases in `tsconfig.json`
```json
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "paths": {
      "@components/*": ["./src/components/*"],
      "@layouts/*": ["./src/layouts/*"],
      "@lib/*": ["./src/lib/*"],
      "@types/*": ["./src/types/*"],
      "@actions/*": ["./src/actions/*"]
    }
  }
}
```

---

## 3. TypeScript & type-safe Supabase

### Generate types from the live schema
```bash
npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id <ref> > src/types/database.types.ts
```
Run via `npm run db:types` whenever the schema changes.

### Typed singleton client
```ts
// src/lib/supabase.ts
import { createClient } from '@supabase/supabase-js'
import type { Database } from '@types/database.types'

export const supabase = createClient<Database>(
  import.meta.env.PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL,
  import.meta.env.PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
)
```

### Strict TypeScript
- `tsconfig.json` extends `astro/tsconfigs/strict`
- No `any` outside generated files
- All env vars typed in `src/env.d.ts`

---

## 4. Data access pattern

### Hard rules
- **Every query lives in `src/lib/queries/<domain>.ts`** — never inline in `.astro` frontmatter
- **No `select('*')` in production** — list columns explicitly
- **Always destructure both `data` and `error`** from Supabase responses
- **Errors fail loud** — log unexpected errors before returning the fallback

---

## 5. Database & RLS

### Schema
- `providers` must have `owner_id uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id)` for RLS to enforce ownership

### Required indexes
```sql
CREATE INDEX idx_providers_district ON providers(district_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_providers_verified ON providers(verified) WHERE verified = true;
CREATE INDEX idx_provider_categories_category ON provider_categories(category_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_districts_canton ON districts(canton_id);
CREATE INDEX idx_districts_slug ON districts(slug);
CREATE INDEX idx_cantons_slug ON cantons(slug);
CREATE INDEX idx_categories_slug ON categories(slug);
```

### RLS policies
Every table has RLS enabled, no exceptions. See `supabase.instructions.md` for policy SQL.

---

## 6. SEO architecture

### URL hierarchy
| Path | Page | JSON-LD |
|---|---|---|
| `/` | Home | `WebSite` + `SearchAction` |
| `/{canton}/` | Canton landing | `Place` + `BreadcrumbList` |
| `/{canton}/{distrito}/` | District landing | `Place` + `BreadcrumbList` |
| `/{canton}/{distrito}/{categoria}` | Provider listing | `ItemList` + `BreadcrumbList` |
| `/proveedor/{id}-{name-slug}` | Provider profile | `LocalBusiness` |

### Per-page requirements
Every page must have:
- Unique `<title>` (50-60 chars)
- `<meta name="description">` (150-160 chars)
- `<link rel="canonical">`
- Single `<h1>` with the primary keyword
- JSON-LD per the table above
- Open Graph tags

### Anti-thin-content
- Skip listings with 0 verified providers in `getStaticPaths()`. The `getListingStaticPaths()` query uses `min_providers: 1`. Internal links from district pages must respect the same threshold or you will create dead links.
- Per-district category descriptions (not generic)
- Internal linking automation: link to nearby districts + other categories in same district

---

## 7. Forms — Astro Actions, not API routes

Use Astro Actions for: provider registration, review submission, photo upload.
Use API routes only for: external webhooks (Stripe etc.), dynamic `robots.txt`, `feed.xml`.

---

## 8. Build performance

- Filter `getStaticPaths` to combinations with ≥1 provider
- Parallelize fetches with `Promise.all`
- Migrate to ISR if build time exceeds ~5 minutes

---

## 9. Deployment

| Phase | Adapter | Mode | When |
|---|---|---|---|
| MVP | none | `output: 'static'` | Until forms are added |
| Forms | `@astrojs/vercel` | `output: 'server'` + `prerender = true` | When `src/actions/` is non-empty |
| Build > 5 min | same | `vercel({ isr: true })` | When build time hurts |
| Edge logic | same | `middlewareMode: 'edge'` | Auth gating, geo redirects |

### Environment variables
| Var | Where | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL` | `.env`, Vercel | safe to expose |
| `PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY` | `.env`, Vercel | safe to expose; RLS enforces |
| `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` | Vercel only | NEVER `PUBLIC_*`, NEVER in `.env` committed |

---

## 10. Banned patterns
- `console.log` in production (use `logger.ts`)
- Hardcoded canton/district/category IDs
- Direct `fetch()` to Supabase URLs (use the typed client)
- Business logic in `.astro` frontmatter (push to `src/lib/queries/`)
- `select('*')` in production
- Mocked Supabase in tests (use real DB)
